conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone.
new_constraint: Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone. Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions - [Your Name]

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a keen follower of contemporary art and have long admired the excellent programming at [Gallery Name]. I am writing to respectfully inquire about your schedule of upcoming exhibitions.

I would be very grateful if you could provide any information regarding shows planned for the coming months. I am particularly interested in exploring works that feature unique perspectives and perhaps those with vibrant, artistic vibes and funky aesthetics, though I am open to discovering any compelling new additions to your calendar.

If you have a digital calendar or a press release detailing your future exhibitions, please feel free to direct me to it. Alternatively, I would be happy to receive a brief overview via email.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of visiting your gallery soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Affiliation, optional]
[Your Phone Number, optional]<turn|>
